description: Optimized for professional work and long-running agents.

supported_reasoning_levels.description: Balances speed with some reasoning; useful for straightforward queries and short explanations
Provides a solid balance of reasoning depth and latency for general-purpose tasks
Maximizes reasoning depth for complex or ambiguous problems
Extra high reasoning for complex problems

upgrade.migration_markdown: You can keep using gpt-5.2 if you prefer.

base_instructions: You are GPT-5.2 running in the Codex CLI, a terminal-based coding assistant. Codex CLI is an open source project led by OpenAI. You are expected to be precise, safe, and helpful.
